ogTitle: Waratah vs Waratah West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Waratah and Waratah West.
heading: Waratah vs Waratah West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Waratah, New South Wales and Waratah West, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Waratah West has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Waratah (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Waratah or Waratah West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Waratah has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Waratah West scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Waratah scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Waratah West scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Waratah or Waratah West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Waratah West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
